description: Create a downloadable product in the Magento admin with the name 'Digital Watercolor Collection Vol. 1', SKU 'DWAC-VOL1', price $14.99, and tax class 'Taxable Goods'. Ensure the status is 'Enabled' and that links can be purchased separately. Add two download links: 1) Title: 'Full Collection (12 PNG Files)', Price: $0.00, Max Downloads: 5, URL: 'https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf'; 2) Title: 'Sample Pack (3 PNG Files)', Price: $4.99, Max Downloads: 3, URL: 'https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf'. Save the product. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
